channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 17.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Armed forces minister Al Carns quits over defence spending plan – UK politics live
item.description: Armed forces minister Al Carns quits over defence spending plan – UK politics live

item.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Starmer’s post-election speech gets worse with age.
He said “incremental change won’t cut it” on defence, growth and Europe and has offered… exactly that.
item.description:
Starmer’s post-election speech gets worse with age.
He said “incremental change won’t cut it” on defence, growth and Europe and has offered… exactly that.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer in fresh crisis as Healey quits government with scathing attack on PM’s plan to protect Britain
item.description: Starmer in fresh crisis as Healey quits government with scathing attack on PM’s plan to protect Britain

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Armed Forces minister resigns from Starmer’s cabinet after John Healey quits over military spending - live updates
item.description: Armed Forces minister resigns from Starmer’s cabinet after John Healey quits over military spending - live updates

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Call me cynical, but nothing says “I was waiting to see if I was offered defence secretary” like waiting the best part of six hours after your boss has quit to resign.
item.description: Call me cynical, but nothing says “I was waiting to see if I was offered defence secretary” like waiting the best part of six hours after your boss has quit to resign.

item.title: LabourList: Al Carns resigns as armed forces minister over funding row
item.description: Al Carns resigns as armed forces minister over funding row

item.title: i Politics: Labour rising star Al Carns resigns as Armed Forces minister - with PM in defence crisis
item.description: Labour rising star Al Carns resigns as Armed Forces minister - with PM in defence crisis

item.title: BBC Politics: Healey quits as defence secretary in row over military spending
item.description: Healey quits as defence secretary in row over military spending

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK defence funding crisis has been a long time coming
item.description: UK defence funding crisis has been a long time coming

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I disagree only in that I think it will probably be one of the disasters where Starmer himself had the right instincts from the start that ends up being the definitive case study.
item.description: I disagree only in that I think it will probably be one of the disasters where Starmer himself had the right instincts from the start that ends up being the definitive case study.
